variables.notes: Direct reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clearly short-term debt, but likely only one component of total short-term debt.
Direct current portion of long-term debt; likely captures the main short-term debt/current maturities amount and avoids lease liabilities.
Also a financing-related current debt line on the balance sheet, but duplicate label appears and may overlap with current maturities total.
Potential short-term borrowing line, but could overlap with other debt components and is small/residual.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the clean current maturities debt total and excluded lease-related rows. Did not add other short-term debt labels to avoid possible double counting with the reported within-1-year maturities total.

candidates.why: Current liability line within the current liabilities section; best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is a current balance sheet tax liability line.

candidates.why: Cash flow investing line, not the balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-specific gross asset line; not preferred for baseline PPE and often not representative of total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset lease line, not PPE total.
Primary net tangible operating asset line on the balance sheet; best available proxy for net PPE in this shipping company.

variables.notes: R:nc. No explicit total Property, plant and equipment line is shown. 'Vessels' appears to be the main net PPE line and is the best available choice, but because total PPE could potentially include other minor tangible assets/newbuilding-related balances, manual review is warranted.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets on the balance sheet.
